# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: functionAppName
  type: 'Microsoft.Web/sites'
  apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
  location: '[parameters('location')]'
  properties:
    name: '[parameters('functionAppName')]'
    identity: 
      type: 'SystemAssigned'
    serverFarmId: '[parameters('hostingPlanName')]'
    siteConfig:
      alwaysOn: true
  resources:
  - name: 'WebJobs.azurefunctions'
    type: 'config'
    apiVersion: '2018-02-01'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/Sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]'
  - name: 'contribute'
    type: 'providers/roleAssignments'
    apiVersion: '2017-05-01'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]'
      principalId: '[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Storage Blob Data Contributor')]'
  properties:
    roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Storage Blob Data Contributor')}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe'
    principalId: '[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Key Vault Contributor')]'
  properties:
    roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Key Vault Contributor')}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b86a8fe4-a1b9-4a2e-a3a3-c7a7b7296472'
    principalId: '[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Cosmos DB Contributer')]'
  properties:
    roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{guid(resourceGroup().id, 'Cosmos DB Contributer')}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/5bd9cd88-fe45-4216-938b-f97437e15450'
    principalId: '[reference(concat('Microsoft.Web/sites/', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]'

- type: 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments'
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'
  name: '[guid(resourceGroup().id, 'SQL DB Contributer')]'
  properties:
